name: analytics-config
title: Web & Product Analytics (GA4/Generic)
description: MCP connector for reading product and web analytics events (funnels, cohorts, experiments). Configure to point at GA4 or a generic analytics API.

auth.notes: Provide service account credentials or OAuth client for read-only analytics access.

exampleUsage: Get last 30 days funnel conversion for onboarding; compare treatment vs control by cohort.
